issue_summary: Add CRC16 tables for ARC, MCRF4XX, and issue NRSC-5
javadoc_before:
/** * Creates a new CRC16-CCITT. *

* The init value is {@code 0x0000}. *

* * @return a new CRC16-CCITT. */
javadoc_after:
/** * Creates a new CRC16-CCITT Checksum. *

* The init value is {@code 0x0000}. *

*

* Also known as: *

*
    *
  • CRC-16/KERMIT
    • *
  • CRC-16/BLUETOOTH
    • *
  • CRC-16/CCITT
    • *
  • CRC-16/CCITT-TRUE
    • *
  • CRC-16/V-41-LSB
    • *
  • CRC-CCITT
    • *
  • KERMIT
    • *
* * @return a new CRC16-CCITT Checksum. */
